carfax.title: Carfax report
carfax.description: Service, accident, ownership and registration records for the US and Canada markets.

autocheck.title: AutoCheck report
autocheck.description: An additional source for comparing auction and vehicle history information.

faq.a1: VIN is a unique 17-character identification number assigned to a vehicle.
faq.q2: Why is buying two reports useful?
faq.a2: Databases use different sources. Carfax and AutoCheck together can create a broader picture.
faq.q3: Where will I see the report?
faq.a3: Purchased reports are stored in your account and can be opened at any time.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: vinyoxla.az is a vehicle history checking platform created by Garant Auto LLC.
about.ownerLine: vinyoxla.az is a product of GARANT AUTO LLC.
about.customOffers: Contact us for individual offers and custom packages.
about.body: GARANT AUTO LLC is a professional company with long-term experience in vehicle delivery. vinyoxla.az was created so car buyers can access information about previous repairs and damages online before purchasing a vehicle. You can now enter a vehicle VIN code and receive information easily. Please make sure the VIN code and selected data source are correct. Purchased digital report documents are non-refundable. By clicking the buy button, you accept our terms.
about.whyText: For imported and used cars, history data makes the decision more transparent: accident records, service history, ownership and auction information can reduce risk before purchase.

legal.privacyBody: vinyoxla.az processes only the information needed to provide the service: phone number, VIN requests, payment status and access links to purchased reports. Card data is processed on the bank page and is not stored by us. Data is used to manage your account, balance and report access.
legal.termsBody: The VIN code and selected report database must be checked by the user. Purchased digital reports are non-refundable. After payment is completed, report links are shown in your account. The service depends on the availability of data sources, and you can contact our support team if a technical error occurs.
